allow:
Bash(git commit --amend -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Match Dashboard with n8n integration

Features:
- Job matching dashboard with AI-powered recommendations
- Application tracking with kanban board view
- Interview scheduling and follow-up management
- Company research integration via n8n workflow
- Resume tailoring integration via n8n workflow
- Neon PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM
- Next.js 14 with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- Activity logging and analytics

Database:
- User profiles with skills and preferences
- Job matches with AI reasoning and skill analysis
- Application tracking with status management
- Interview scheduling
- Document management for resumes and cover letters
- Company research with AI-generated insights
- Tailored resumes generated per job

n8n Integrations:
- Company Research workflow (/api/research/company)
- Resume Tailor workflow (/api/tailor/resume)
EOF
)")
